# Test mcpdiff compare mode functionality

# Create a test trace file with shadow records
exec echo '# mcptrace:v1 compare=true' > test-compare.mcp
exec echo 'mcp-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"calc","id":1,"params":{"value":42}} # 1683000000.000 spanid=aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa1' >> test-compare.mcp
exec echo 'mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"answer":84}} # 1683000000.100 spanid=aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa2' >> test-compare.mcp
exec echo 'mcp-send-shadow {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"answer":86}} # 1683000000.101 spanid=bbbbbbbbbbbbbbb2 linksto=aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa2 baggage=shadow=true' >> test-compare.mcp

# Run mcpdiff in compare mode
exec mcpdiff -compare test-compare.mcp
stdout '@@ -4,1 +4,1 @@'
stdout '-send # 1683000000.100 {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"answer":84}}'
stdout '\+send-shadow # 1683000000.101 {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"answer":86}}'

# Test with no differences
exec echo '# mcptrace:v1 compare=true' > test-no-diff.mcp
exec echo 'mcp-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"ping","id":1} # 1683000000.000 spanid=ccccccccccccccc1' >> test-no-diff.mcp
exec echo 'mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":"pong"} # 1683000000.100 spanid=ccccccccccccccc2' >> test-no-diff.mcp
exec echo 'mcp-send-shadow {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":"pong"} # 1683000000.101 spanid=ddddddddddddddd2 linksto=ccccccccccccccc2 baggage=shadow=true' >> test-no-diff.mcp

exec mcpdiff -compare test-no-diff.mcp
! stdout @@ # No diff output when responses match

# Test with semantic comparison
exec mcpdiff -compare -s test-compare.mcp
stdout '@@ -4,1 +4,1 @@'
stdout '"answer":84'
stdout '"answer":86'
